[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110110110 6
1 0000110111 5
2 0001101011 5
3 1010000000 2
4 1001100111 6
5 0110010111 6
6 0000000000 a
7 1011100100 5

01 10 0010100100 3
12 21 0110100110 5
23 32 0000110110 4
34 43 0000100011 3
45 54 0000000000 a match 6
56 65 1000000000 1
67 76 0000000111 3
70 07 0010000100 2

02 20 0010100100 3
13 31 0000100111 4
24 42 0000100010 2
35 53 0000000000 a match 6
46 64 0001100011 4
57 75 0010000000 1
60 06 1001100100 4
71 17 0110000111 5

03 30 0000100100 2
14 41 0000100011 3
25 52 0010000000 1
36 63 0000100111 4
47 74 0000000011 2
50 05 1010000000 2 match 3
61 16 0000100111 4
72 27 0110010110 5

04 40 0001100000 2
15 51 0010000000 1
26 62 0000100110 3
37 73 0000010111 4
